_doc: Append-only ledger of papers that have already shipped in a blog post. The discovery layer reads this file and filters out any candidate whose arxiv_id is already listed, so the same paper never gets a second writeup. Updated by scripts/discover_papers.py:mark_paper_as_used after a successful write_post.

papers.title: Rethinking Generalization in Reasoning SFT: A Conditional Analysis on Optimization, Data, and Model Capability
ClawBench: Can AI Agents Complete Everyday Online Tasks?
GameWorld: Towards Standardized and Verifiable Evaluation of Multimodal Game Agents
MolmoAct2: Action Reasoning Models for Real-world Deployment
